name: openstack-k8s-agent-tools
description: Marketplace for openstack-k8s-operators operator development and troubleshooting tools

plugins.name: openstack-k8s-agent-tools
plugins.description: Comprehensive development and troubleshooting tools for openstack-k8s-operators (Red Hat OpenStack Services on OpenShift) operators. Provides systematic debugging workflows, code analysis, log pattern recognition, and development best practices with integration for openstack-k8s-operators conventions, Ginkgo testing framework, and gopls modernization patterns.
